predicates.name: does_not_provide_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as a foreigner.

predicates.name: does_not_have_union_citizenship
predicates.description: The person is not a citizen of the Union.

predicates.name: not_covered_by_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person is not covered by free-movement law.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as a third-country national.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The person does not or no longer satisfies the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as being in illegal stay.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_grant_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_or_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure determining or transferring responsibility for an international protection request.

predicates.name: subject_to_relevant_absconding_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to one of the procedures relevant to assessing risk of absconding.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed.

predicates.name: all_individual_circumstances_considered
predicates.description: All circumstances specific to the person's case have been considered.

predicates.name: current_and_real_reasons_to_assume_absconding
predicates.description: There are current and real reasons to assume that the person will abscond.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person filed no residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay.

predicates.name: international_protection_request_not_within_legal_period
predicates.description: The person did not make an international protection request within the legally prescribed period.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information in a relevant immigration procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_forged_documents_in_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or forged documents in a relevant immigration procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means_in_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant immigration procedure.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_competent_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate with authorities competent for immigration access, stay, establishment, or removal rules.

predicates.name: did_not_cooperate_with_competent_authorities
predicates.description: The person previously did not cooperate with authorities competent for immigration access, stay, establishment, or removal rules.

predicates.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_specified_measure
predicates.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or already failed to comply with, a specified transfer, refusal, removal, entry-ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent measure.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_negative_or_return_decision
predicates.description: The person filed a new residence or international protection application immediately after a negative residence or entry decision, end-of-stay decision, refusal, or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_bound_state_when_questioned
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously given fingerprints in a state bound by the relevant responsibility-determination rules after an international protection request.

predicates.name: multiple_unsuccessful_protection_or_residence_applications
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple international protection or residence applications that resulted in negative decisions or no residence title.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_bound_state_when_questioned
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection request in a state bound by the relevant responsibility-determination rules.

predicates.name: came_for_purpose_other_than_application_purpose
predicates.description: The person declared, or the file shows, that they came for purposes other than those for which the residence or international protection application was submitted.

predicates.name: fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_immigration_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine for filing a manifestly unlawful immigration appeal.

predicates.name: has_absconding_objective_criterion
predicates.description: At least one statutory objective criterion for risk of absconding is present for the person.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: The person is legally considered to present a risk of absconding.

predicates.name: has_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid travel document.

predicates.name: has_valid_passport
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid passport.

predicates.name: has_valid_identity_document
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognized_as_national_by_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person has been recognized as a national by the national authority of their country and that authority is willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: nationality_category_allows_minister_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person falls within a nationality category for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is legally classified as an identified foreigner.
